article_title: ASP.NET Core 限流：从 429 到 Redis 的生产配置
core_theme: 在 ASP.NET Core .NET 10 中给 API 配好限流策略，保护数据库、外部 API 和高成本端点。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解四种内置限流算法的选择方式，并知道生产环境需要补齐 429、Retry-After、分区和 Redis。
summary_angle: 把一次高频请求压垮 API 的风险，压缩成“选择算法、返回 429、跨实例同步”三段流程。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头的 pricing endpoint 示例，单个 free-tier 用户循环请求导致 PostgreSQL CPU 到 90 percent。
information_blocks.visual_idea: API 网关前的闸门拦住一串密集请求，后方数据库从红色压力转为稳定。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文决策表：Public REST API 推荐 Token Bucket，登录和 OTP 推荐 Sliding Window，高成本端点推荐 Concurrency Limiter。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间分镜展示三个限流器卡片被选入不同端点。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Key Takeaways：显式设置 RejectionStatusCode = 429，并从 MetadataName.RetryAfter 写 Retry-After。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧响应卡片只显示 429 和 Retry-After 两个短标记。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 In-Memory Trap：多副本下内存限流的有效上限会变成 configured limit x instance count，需 Redis backplane。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 三个实例连到一个 Redis 中心计数器，避免各自计数。

main_metaphor: API 入口处的限流闸门把请求流整理成可控节奏。
primary_subject: 一个带仪表刻度的 API 闸门
subject_action: 闸门把过密请求拦截成 429，把允许请求送往后方服务。
composition: 单点聚焦，左到右分镜推进
comic_style_reason: 这是一篇配置教程，读者需要按步骤理解限流算法、拒绝响应和跨实例计数，适合用日漫式分镜推进。
draft_goal: 先验证 API 闸门、429 响应和 Redis 共享计数三段信息是否清楚。
revision_targets: 避免画成真实系统截图
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: production-grade rate limiting in ASP.NET Core .NET 10. The reader should quickly feel that API traffic can be controlled before expensive backend work starts.

Summary angle: compress the article into three readable beats: block abusive traffic, choose the right limiter, return 429 with Retry-After, and share counters with Redis in multi-instance deployments.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- problem: a noisy caller can push the backend to 90% CPU, visible label "拦请求", numeric fact "90%"
- step: choose limiter by endpoint shape, visible label "选算法"
- takeaway: rejected requests return 429 and Retry-After, visible label "429"
- mechanism: multi-instance deployments need a Redis backplane, visible label "Redis"

Main metaphor: a rate-limiting gate at the API entrance shapes a flood of requests into a controlled stream.
Subject: a large API gate with a pressure gauge, blocking dense request lines while clean allowed traffic reaches backend services.
Composition/framing: single focal point with left-to-right panelized storytelling. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: final style must be japanese-manga, interpreted through editorial technical illustration. Stylized ink lines, restrained speed lines, limited color, polished, clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover.
Color palette: ink black, warm amber, cool cyan, paper white.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels or numeric chips: "拦请求", "选算法", "429", "Redis", and no more than 4 total text items. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real dashboards, fake terminal output, complex architecture diagrams, English slogans, dense code rain, neon city.
